recommendations.description: Add independent discovery for list_tasks, then chain describe_task with for_each and params. describe_task requires TaskArn parameter which must come from list_tasks.
recommendations.impact: Fixes parameter validation errors, enables proper discovery chain

recommendations.description: Fix empty emit structure - currently item: {} emits no fields. Need to emit CloudWatchLogGroupArn and other relevant fields from describe_task response.
recommendations.impact: Enables field access in conditions, fixes empty emit issue

recommendations.description: Verify actual API response structure from describe_task to ensure CloudWatchLogGroupArn field name and path are correct.
recommendations.impact: Ensures field path matches actual API response

validation_issues: Missing discovery chain - describe_task requires TaskArn parameter
Empty emit structure - no fields are emitted
Need to verify CloudWatchLogGroupArn field name in API response

api_structure.list_tasks: Returns list of tasks - independent, no params needed (likely returns Tasks[] array)
api_structure.describe_task: Returns task details - requires TaskArn parameter
api_structure.discovery_pattern: Must use list_tasks first to get task ARNs, then describe_task with those ARNs

issues: Missing discovery chain - describe_task requires TaskArn parameter
